name: P3-reports-permission
description: Non-admin user cannot run a custom Profit & Loss report. The admin claims permissions are set correctly. Ambiguous between reports and permissions - exercises categoryCheck.
parserText:
COID/MID: 6128 / 0033-7741
CASE: ESC-2026-0512-P3C
CLIENT/CONTACT: Hollander Veterinary Clinic - Alex R. (non-admin user) and Dr. Hollander (admin).
CX IS ATTEMPTING TO: Open the company custom P&L by Class report from the Reports tab.
EXPECTED OUTCOME: The custom report opens with the year-to-date numbers Alex needs for the partner meeting.
ACTUAL OUTCOME: Clicking the report title returns the page 'Sorry, you don't have permission to view this report. Check with your admin.' The admin confirms Reports access is enabled and screen-shared the permission matrix showing 'View custom reports = on'.
KB/TOOLS USED: Custom reports permission article, screen share recording with the admin, internal permission diagnostic tool.
TRIED TEST ACCOUNT: Yes - a fresh test user added to the same role hit the same error. A new test user added to the admin role can open the report.
TS STEPS: Verified the user role in Manage Users. Asked the admin to toggle View custom reports off then on (no change). Cleared browser cache, tried incognito, tried a different browser, all reproduced the error. Escalating because the admin sees the toggle as on but the user sees a permission block, suggesting either a permission rollout bug or a custom-report-specific permission we cannot see in the UI.
